scripts.generate: bunx @openapitools/openapi-generator-cli@2.20.2 generate -i ../../../docs/public/api-reference/fabro-api.yaml -g typescript-axios --additional-properties=supportsES6=true,typescriptThreePlus=true,withSeparateModelsAndApi=true,apiPackage=api,modelPackage=models,useTags=true,enumPropertyNaming=UPPERCASE -o src && bun run scripts/normalize-generated.ts
